creator: matusita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
knu> I modified these ports as attached.  Please check if they are okay.

Seems good. I think do-fetch target of linux-vmware-tools/Makefile is
a little bit complicated, but maybe it give us more flexible way of
installing this port.

knu> I did pretty big changes, so ask me anything you don't understand.

No problem, except of tar+gzip+uuencode archive which I cannot
interpret directly :-)

knu> Incidentally, please do a portlint before submitting a port.  I had to
knu> get rid of some trivial lints that can easily found by portlint.

Ya, verry sorry, I forgot to through a portlint check.

-- -
Makoto `MAR' MATSUSHITA, at Mister Donut (Miyazaki Ichiban-gai)
